'''''Fingertip Express''''' was [[Moranda Savich]]'s personal [[Sydon Vehicle Works]] [[MRX-BR Pacifier]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
